channel.title: Daily Feed (Last 48 Hours, Updated 9 AM BD)
channel.description: Daily Feed (Last 48 Hours, Updated 9 AM BD) generated by script

item.title: Checks and Balance newsletter: The shock-value of modern conservatism
item.description: John Prideaux, our US editor, unpacks how provocation has become a political strategy

item.title: The Staged Death of China’s Military-Civil Fusion
item.description: Military-civil fusion became a major irritant in China-U.S. relations, so Beijing stopped talking about it. But it didn't stop pursuing the strategy.
